Sequence similarities: SIMILARITY: Belongs to the methyltransferase superfamily. {ECO:0000305}.
Catalytic activity: CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=indole-3-pyruvate + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = (R)-3-(indol-3-yl)-2-oxobutanoate + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine + H(+); Xref=Rhea:RHEA:12112, ChEBI:CHEBI:15378, ChEBI:CHEBI:17640, ChEBI:CHEBI:57856, ChEBI:CHEBI:59789, ChEBI:CHEBI:91180; EC=2.1.1.47; Evidence={ECO:0000269|PubMed:25730866, ECO:0000269|PubMed:809439};
Function [CC]: FUNCTION: Involved in the biosynthesis of the antibiotic indolmycin, an inhibitor of the bacterial tryptophan-tRNA synthetases. Catalyzes the transfer of a methyl group from S-adenosyl-L-methionine to position 3 of the aliphatic side chain of (indol-3-yl)pyruvate to yield 3-methylindolepyruvate. {ECO:0000269|PubMed:25730866, ECO:0000269|PubMed:809439}.
